dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Select a server profile to get started, or add one in Settings.

buckets.title: Buckets
buckets.bucketNameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and periods. 3-63 characters.
buckets.selectProfileFirst: Select a server profile first to view buckets.
buckets.prefixHint: Optional. Filter objects by key prefix.
buckets.policyDescription: Control anonymous access to this bucket. Similar to mc anonymous set.

accessModeHint.private: No anonymous access. Only authenticated users with permissions can access.
accessModeHint.download: Anonymous users can list and download objects (read-only).
accessModeHint.public: Anonymous users can list, download, upload and delete objects (read-write).

objects.title: Objects
objects.selectBucketFirst: Select a bucket from the Buckets page to browse objects.

users.title: Users
users.secretKeyKeep: Secret Key (leave blank to keep current)
users.selectProfileFirst: Select a server profile first to view users.

groups.title: Groups
groups.membersHint: Comma-separated list of user access keys.
groups.selectProfileFirst: Select a server profile first to view groups.

policies.title: Policies
policies.selectProfileFirst: Select a server profile first to view policies.

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.selectProfileFirst: Select a server profile first to view monitoring data.

terminal.title: MC Terminal
terminal.helpText:
Type an mc command below and press Enter. Commands are executed against the active server profile.

Examples: ls, admin info, admin user list
Use Tab to autocomplete commands.
terminal.selectProfileFirst: Select a server profile first to use the terminal.

validation.bucketNameMin: Bucket name must be at least 3 characters
validation.bucketNameMax: Bucket name must be at most 63 characters
validation.bucketNamePattern: Bucket name must be lowercase, start/end with letter or number
validation.accessKeyMin: Access key must be at least 3 characters
validation.secretKeyMin: Secret key must be at least 8 characters
validation.fixJsonSyntax: Please fix the JSON syntax before saving.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to the server.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your access key and secret key.
errors.bucketAlreadyExists: A bucket with this name already exists.
errors.bucketNotEmpty: The bucket is not empty. Delete all objects first.
errors.policyInUse: This policy is currently in use and cannot be deleted.
